claim_boundary: PASS is limited to the selected automated serial EE871 CLI command groups. It does not prove CO2 accuracy, warm-up suitability, persistent-write safety, fault tolerance, long-soak stability, calibration validity, or production readiness.

commands.clean_excerpt:
=== Version Info ===
  Example firmware build: Jun  1 2026 20:57:04
  EE871 library version: 0.3.0
  EE871 library full: 0.3.0 (84a46b6, 2026-06-01 20:57:01, clean)
  EE871 library build: 2026-06-01 20:57:01
  EE871 library commit: 84a46b6 (clean)
  Sensor firmware: use command 'fw'
>

- Write persistent CO2 filter
  mode                             - Read operating mode
  mode <val>                       - Write persistent operating mode (0..3)

[Calibration]
  offset                           - Read CO2 offset (ppm)
  offset <val>                     - Write persistent CO2 offset (signed)
  gain                             - Read CO2 gain
  gain <val>                       - Write persistent CO2 gain
  calpoints                        - Read last calibration points
  autoadj                          - Read auto-adjust status
  autoadj start                    - Start config-changing auto-adjustment (~5 min)

[Bus Safety]
  buscheck                         - Check if bus is idle
  libreset                         - Bus reset via library

[Diagnostics]
  diag                             - Run full diagnostic suite
  levels                           - Read current bus levels
  pintest                          - Test pin toggle (MCU bus control)
  clocktest                        - Generate clock pulses and verify
  sniff                            - Toggle sniffer on/off
  timing                           - Try different clock frequencies
  busreset                         - Send 9 clocks to recover stuck bus
  tx <hex>                         - Test transaction with control byte
  libtest                          - Test all library commands (begin uses)
  caps                             - Print feature capability booleans
  trace stats                      - Show bus trace buffer stats
  trace clear                      - Clear buffered trace events
>
